title: pedicularis pyrenaica subsp. lasiocalyx
intro: Pedicularis pyrenaica subsp. lasiocalyx is a subspecies of the Pedicularis pyrenaica plant, commonly known as the Lasiocalyx or Pyrenean lousewort. This plant is a type of flowering plant in the bumblebee orchid family, Orobanchaceae. The medicinal properties of Pedicularis pyrenaica subsp. lasiocalyx include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include improved cardiovascular health, antioxidant properties, and potential anti-aging effects, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
